On this page

Pricing ​

WebRouter is available in two editions. The Community Edition is free and open-source. The Enterprise Edition adds advanced features for organizations that need SSO, audit logging, cluster deployment, and commercial support.

Edition Comparison ​

FeatureCommunity (CE)Enterprise (EE)
LicenseBSL 1.1 (→ Apache 2.0 in 2029)Proprietary EULA
PriceFreeContact Us
Provider Management✓✓
Smart Routing✓✓
Session Memory Recall✓Advanced retention
Knowledge Base & RAGBasic RAGCustom data sources & pipelines
Cost OptimizationBasicAdvanced (token/session compression)
Cost Tracking & Billing✓✓
Desensitization✓✓
AlertingEmail alertsAll channels
Multi-Tenant (Tokens & Teams)✓✓
Health Monitoring✓✓
wr-proxy (Go Gateway)✓✓
Max Concurrent Connections50Customizable
Cache Size64MBCustomizable
SSO / SAML / OIDC—✓
Custom Audit LoggingBasicCustom rules & retention
Custom Metrics & Statistics—✓
Cluster Deployment—✓
Enhanced Alert ChannelsEmail onlyDingTalk, Feishu, Slack, PagerDuty
Commercial Support SLA—✓
On-Premise Deployment✓✓
Docker / Bare Metal✓✓

Enterprise Edition ​

The Enterprise Edition is designed for organizations that need:

  • SSO Integration — SAML, OIDC, Azure AD, Okta, Google Workspace
  • Custom Audit Logging — Configurable rules and retention policies for compliance
  • Session Memory Recall — Long-term retention and advanced retrieval
  • Knowledge Base & RAG — Custom data sources and pipelines
  • Cost Optimization — Token compression, session compression, dynamic reorder
  • Custom Metrics & Statistics — Tailored dashboards and reporting
  • High Availability — Cluster deployment with load balancing
  • Multi-Channel Alerts — DingTalk, Feishu, Slack, PagerDuty, and custom webhooks
  • SLA Support — Guaranteed response times and dedicated support engineer

Cloud Edition (Coming Soon) ​

A hosted SaaS version is in development. No installation required — get started in minutes with a single API key.

Contact ​

Interested in the Enterprise Edition? Reach out to discuss your requirements:

  • Email: candywon@qq.com
  • Website: https://webrouter.tech

Volume discounts and custom deployments are available.
